title: CreatePositionRequest
description: CreatePositionRequest schema from Uniswap Trading API

existingPool.description: Parameters for an existing pool. Provide either existingPool or newPool, not both.

newPool.description: Parameters for creating a new pool. Provide either existingPool or newPool, not both.

independentToken.description: The token whose amount you are specifying.

dependentToken.description: The other token. The server computes the required amount. If provided, the amount is used as a maximum.

priceBounds.description: Price bounds for the position range. Provide either priceBounds or tickBounds, not both.

tickBounds.description: Tick bounds for the position range. Provide either priceBounds or tickBounds, not both.

slippageTolerance.description: Slippage tolerance as a decimal (e.g., 0.5 for 0.5%).

deadline.description: Unix timestamp after which the transaction will revert.

simulateTransaction.description: If true, the response will include the gas fee.

batchPermitData.description: Batch permit data for V4 positions.

nativeTokenBalance.description: The wallet's native token balance, used for wrapping calculations when one of the tokens is the native token.
